_comments.fleet_a_archetype_id: Fleet A archetype top-level key in archetypes_v1_5.json (or 'default').
_comments.fleet_b_archetype_id: Fleet B archetype top-level key in archetypes_v1_5.json (or 'default').
_comments.display_language: Label language for plot names: 'EN' or 'ZH'.
_comments.initial_fleet_aspect_ratio: Initial formation col/row ratio. Example: 2.0 means wider than tall.
_comments.max_time_steps: Maximum simulation ticks. If <=0, run until first fleet elimination +10 ticks, capped at 999 ticks.
_comments.random_seed: General visualization seed (non-map). If -1, use true randomness.
_comments.background_map_seed: Background map seed (stars/planet/asteroid field). If -1, use true randomness.
_comments.attack_range: Combat hit range (distance threshold). Phase V governance default is 5.0.
_comments.damage_per_tick: Base attack damage per successful hit event.
_comments.fire_quality_alpha: Directional fire-quality coefficient alpha. 0.0 disables directional effect; 0.1 is current recommended default.
_comments.alpha_safe_max: Documented safe upper bound for fire_quality_alpha: 0.15 (governance note).
_comments.contact_hysteresis_h: Contact hysteresis band ratio h. Compare h=0.0 vs h=0.1 for edge-contact stability observation.
_comments.fsr_enabled: Enable Formation Scale Relaxation (FSR) movement-scale block (true/false).
_comments.fsr_strength: FSR per-tick relaxation strength. Recommended safe range: [0.0, 0.3].
_comments.boundary_enabled: Enable boundary mechanisms as a pair (soft + hard clamp). true=both ON, false=both OFF. Default false for DOE/general runs.
_comments.min_unit_spacing: Minimum initial physical spacing and movement separation radius. Recommended default=2.0; density stress mode=1.0.
_comments.unit_max_hit_points: Initial and max HP per unit.
_comments.auto_zoom_2d: Auto zoom battlefield view during animation (update every 50 ticks; true/false).
_comments.show_attack_target_lines: Visual-only toggle. Draw thin red lines each frame from attacker center (post-tick position) to current target center (post-tick position).
